data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'work completed summary by trade/area', but the provided evidence does not include any details or data that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case outlines various aspects of a construction site report but does not explicitly mention a summary categorized by trade or area, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. This lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of a work completed summary by trade/area.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
